queue.title: Extend api.test.mjs state isolation to inbox.json and deprecations.json
queue.description: (added ~s1673): wq-762 added backup/restore for human-review.json, but api.test.mjs also POSTs test data to /inbox, /deprecations, /snapshots, /directory, /paste, /kv, and /polls endpoints. Inbox has a post-test filter cleanup but others don't. Extending STATE_FILES_TO_ISOLATE to cover inbox.json and deprecations.json prevents test-data pollution.

queue.title: Integrate engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs into E session pre-hook
queue.description: (added ~s1689): engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs detects platform concentration in E sessions but isn't wired into any hook. Add a call in 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh with --json --alert-file to automatically surface diversity warnings before each E session, preventing concentration drift proactively.

queue.title: Add tests for d071-baseline.cjs coverage tool
queue.description: (promoted ~s1701 from brainstorming): d071-baseline.cjs is a critical-path tool consumed by A sessions for coverage trend tracking with no test. Test should verify: correct file scanning for critical-path/hooks, --summary output structure matches SUBCHECKS.md spec, trend calculation with mock previous baseline, verdict thresholds (target_met/on_track/at_risk/behind), stall_count logic. Improves d071 coverage metrics since the tool itself is in the critical path.

queue.title: Close stale hr-a173-1 entry in human-review.json
queue.description: (audit a181-2): hr-a173-1 (GitHub PAT expired) is effectively resolved via SSH key auth (wq-764, s1679). Git push confirmed working. Entry still shows as critical/open despite 2 audits recommending closure. Single edit: set status=resolved, add resolved date.

outcome.note: Set hr-a173-1 status=resolved, added resolved date, appended closure to escalation history. Removed duplicate 'updated' key.

queue.title: Review Clawsta picker weight and make structural decision
queue.description: (audit a181-3): Clawsta engagement value questioned for 3 consecutive audits with no structural action. Platform has ~2 active users and near-zero engagement. Review Clawsta ROI weight in platform-picker scoring. Either confirm weight is appropriate (with documented justification) or adjust downward. Resolve the recurring audit finding.

outcome.note: Decision: KEEP current weight. Clawsta weight=68 (base=30, recency=1.5x, explore=1.5x) is not inflated — same tier as Pinchwork/Shipyard. 91 successes at 97.8% rate. Sophia_Elya produces substantive threads (s1687 spam analysis, s1692 BoTTube moderation). Low user count ≠ low value — quality of engagement matters. All platforms share the same base=30 default; no analytics-driven differentiation exists yet. No code change needed.
